data.description:
This move opens the door for financial institutions to explore the digital asset space without waiting for approvals that never arrived. The FDIC, which oversees many small banks and protects the banking system, played a big …
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/fdic-clears-the-way-for-banks-to-engage-in-crypto-activities-no-prior-approval-required/

data.title: MELANIA Token Crashes! Is Hayden Davis Behind Another Rug Pull?
data.description:
Blockchain analytics firm Bubblemaps has revealed that Davis has been aggressively selling MELANIA tokens over the past 14 days. His wallets have dumped around $1. 06 million worth of tokens onto centralized exchanges while also withdrawing over $2
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/melania-token-crashes-is-hayden-davis-behind-another-rug-pull/

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Whale User Sells Unstaked SOL for USDC After Six Months
data.description: According to PANews, a whale user recently unstaked 60,289 SOL, valued at approximately $7.78 million, after a six-month staking period. The SOL was sold for $7.73 million USDC, with an average price of $128.29 per SOL. This transaction was monitored by Onchain Lens three hours ago.

data.title: Stablecoin Trading Volume Declines Amid Market Challenges
data.description: According to PANews, the trading volume of the top ten stablecoins has dropped to a quarter of the levels seen during the bull market cycle last December. Analysts attribute this decline to trader fatigue, regulatory uncertainty, and Bitcoin's supply reaching a seven-year low.

data.title: Hyperliquid Announces Key Risk Management Updates Following JELLY Market Incident
data.description:
Bitget's Gracy Chen recently accused Hyperliquid of mismanagement similar to FTX, while citing decentralization concerns and risky vault structures after its JELLY delisting.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/hyperliquid-announces-key-risk-management-updates-following-jelly-market-incident/

data.title: 125,600 ETH held by two whales are facing liquidation, with liquidation prices of $1,805 and $1,787 respectively
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 125,603 ETH held by two whales are facing liquidation, worth US$238 million, with liquidation prices of US$1,805 and US$1,787 respectively.

data.title: Circle Reports Increase in USDC Circulation Amid Recent Issuances and Redemptions
data.description:
According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle has issued approximately 44 billion USDC and redeemed around 34 billion USDC over the past week ending March 27, 2025. This activity has resulted in an increase of about 10 billion USDC in circulation.

The total circulation of USDC now stands at 602 billion units, supported by reserves amounting to approximately $604 billion. These reserves include around $7 billion in cash and $53.4 billion held in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: Cardano Price In Spotlight, What to Expect
data.description:
After noting a brief recovery, Cardano (ADA) price crashed in keeping with the overall market movement. Notably, the coin found a new support level at $0. 73, as a momentary dip below this price was swiftly cleared off. At the same time, Cardano traders have committed over one billion ADA in Open Interest
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/29/cardano-price-in-spotlight-what-to-expect/

data.title: The whale bought 20,654 AAVE with 1,906 ETH 5 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @lookonchain monitoring, a whale spent 1906 ETH (about 3.6 million US dollars) to purchase 20654 AAVE 5 hours ago, with an average price of about 175 US dollars.
